name: Attack
note: Skill 1 corresponds to the attack command.

name: Defend
note: Skill 2 corresponds to the defend command.

description:
Below is the skill frame to be displayed at the top
when opening the menu, rather than the battle skills.
name: -----Reserved

description: Performs a continuous attack on a single enemy target.
name: Continuous Attack

description: Performs 2 attacks on a random single enemy target.
name: 2-time Attack

description: Performs 3 attacks on a random single enemy target.
name: 3-time Attack

description: The user leaves the battle.
name: Run Away

description: Observe.
name: Observe

description: Absorbs the HP of a single enemy.
name: Bloodsucking

description: Restores the user's HP.
name: Meditation

description: Strikes a single enemy with a paralysis needle, causing paralysis.
name: Numbing Needle

description: Deals damage to a single enemy and disrupts their balance.
name: Tackle

description: Deals lightning attribute damage to a single enemy and paralyzes them.
name: Electric Shock

description: Attaches mucus to a single enemy, lowering their Agility.
name: Mucus

description: Sprays toxic liquid on a single enemy, poisoning them.
name: Toxic Liquid

description: Invigorates the user's fighting spirit, strengthening their abilities.
name: Roar

description: Absorbs MP from a single enemy.
name: Bizarre Dance

name: Paralyzing Glare
